latest_models.name: Llama 3.2
latest_models.highlights: First Llama with vision capability; 128K context; strong instruction following; available via Ollama

latest_models.name: Mistral Small 3
latest_models.highlights: New state-of-the-art at 22B scale; outperforms models 2x its size on reasoning tasks

latest_models.name: Qwen 2.5
latest_models.highlights: Entire model family open sourced; 72B rivals GPT-4o on several benchmarks; strong coding performance

latest_models.name: Gemma 2
latest_models.highlights: Knowledge distillation from Gemini; 9B outperforms Llama 3 8B on most benchmarks; efficient inference

latest_models.name: Phi-3.5
latest_models.highlights: Small but mighty; phi-3.5-mini matches 7B models; MoE variant with 42B params but 7B active; strong reasoning

latest_models.name: DeepSeek-R1
latest_models.highlights: First fully open reasoning model; uses extended chain-of-thought; 671B rivals o1 on math/coding

recent_benchmarks.name: MMLU Pro
recent_benchmarks.description: Extended MMLU with harder reasoning questions across 14 subjects

recent_benchmarks.name: HumanEval+
recent_benchmarks.description: Enhanced code generation benchmark with edge cases

recent_benchmarks.name: MTEB Retrieval
recent_benchmarks.description: Massive Text Embedding Benchmark - retrieval subset

recent_benchmarks.name: RAGBench
recent_benchmarks.description: End-to-end RAG pipeline evaluation across 10 domains

recent_benchmarks.name: HELMET (Long Context)
recent_benchmarks.description: Holistic Evaluation of Long-context Language Models

trending_techniques.name: Reasoning-Enhanced RAG
trending_techniques.description: Combine chain-of-thought reasoning with retrieval. The model reasons about what to retrieve before and after fetching documents. DeepSeek-R1 style extended thinking applied to retrieval decisions.

trending_techniques.name: Speculative RAG
trending_techniques.description: Use a small model to generate multiple draft answers with different retrieved contexts; a larger model selects the best. Reduces latency while maintaining quality of larger models.

trending_techniques.name: GraphRAG
trending_techniques.description: Build a knowledge graph over the document corpus. Retrieve subgraphs relevant to the query instead of flat chunks. Microsoft's GraphRAG enables global summarization queries across large corpora.

trending_techniques.name: Adaptive Retrieval
trending_techniques.description: Dynamically decide whether to retrieve based on query uncertainty. Skip retrieval for queries the model can answer from parametric memory. Reduces latency by 30-40% on trivial queries.

trending_techniques.name: Multimodal RAG
trending_techniques.description: Extend RAG to include images, tables, charts, and diagrams. Retrieve and reason over mixed-modality content. Requires multimodal embeddings and vision-language models.
trending_techniques.adoption: Early production for document-heavy use cases

trending_techniques.name: Agentic RAG
trending_techniques.description: Use an LLM agent to orchestrate retrieval dynamically. The agent plans which sources to query, evaluates results, refines queries, and combines multi-source information. LangGraph and LlamaIndex Workflows are primary implementation frameworks.
trending_techniques.adoption: Rapidly growing — becoming the default for complex RAG systems

trending_techniques.name: ColPali (Late Interaction for Documents)
trending_techniques.description: Document understanding approach that embeds page images directly using vision models. Enables retrieval over PDF pages without OCR or text extraction. Significantly better on tables, charts, and complex layouts.
